name: C-7 --validate exits two on bomFormat other than CycloneDX per the schema contract
command: printf '%s' '{"bomFormat":"spdx","specVersion":"1.6","components":[]}' > a.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --validate a.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'bomFormat' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
